ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, aerial survey) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "geospatial_type" TEXT /* Type of geospatial data (e.g., raster, vector) */,
  "spatial_reference" TEXT /* Spatial reference system (e.g., WGS84, UTM) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the temperature range */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature value of the range */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature value of the range */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with this range */,
  "range_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the temperature range for scoring purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_ranges_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "score_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the score */,
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature range */,
  "tmin_score" REAL /* Score for the minimum temperature */,
  "tmax_score" REAL /* Score for the maximum temperature */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score for the temperature range */,
  "score_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the score for overall scoring */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_scores_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("range_id") REFERENCES temperature_ranges ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matching_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matching metric entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the metric */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score associated with the matching metrics */,
  "match_iou" REAL /* Intersection over Union metric */,
  "match_ioa" REAL /* Area over Attribution metric */,
  "metric_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the metric for overall scoring */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_metrics_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES temperature_scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file (e.g., GeoTIFF, Shapefile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the scoring algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the scoring algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the algorithm is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scoring algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the algorithm was applied to */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was used */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm usage (e.g., started, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_usage_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES scoring_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the result */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score calculated for the dataset */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to calculate the score */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Numerical value of the result */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES temperature_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES scoring_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., upload, access, error) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparative) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
